description: hf - Command-line interface for the Hugging Face Hub.

next.name: login
tip: Log in to the Hugging Face Hub.

next.name: logout
tip: Log out from the Hugging Face Hub.

next.name: add-repo
tip: Add a repository to a collection.

next.name: remove-repo
tip: Remove a repository from a collection.

common_option.name: --include
tip: Glob patterns for files to include.

common_option.name: --exclude
tip: Glob patterns for files to exclude.

common_option.name: --force
tip: Force download even if files exist.

next.name: get
tip: Get details of an inference endpoint.

next.name: status
tip: Get the status of an inference endpoint.

next.name: logs
tip: Get logs for an inference endpoint.

next.name: url
tip: Get the URL of an inference endpoint.

common_option.name: url_or_path
tip: URL or local path of the extension.

common_option.name: --arguments
tip: Training arguments as JSON or YAML.

next.name: transfer
tip: Transfer a repository to another namespace.

next.name: status
tip: Get runtime status of a space.

common_option.name: local_path
tip: Local file or directory to upload.

root.name: upload-large-folder
tip: Upload large folders to a repository.

root.name: version
tip: Show the version of the hf CLI.
